key_concerns: Threshold gaming: Amendment (Dodatok č. 1) to Obec Liptovské Sliače contract reduced value to 212,783.85 EUR — only 2,216 EUR below the 215K EU procurement threshold, potentially avoiding mandatory EU-wide tender.
Revenue-to-contracts mismatch: Company reports 347K EUR revenue (FinStat) but holds 912K EUR in active government contracts — nearly 3x its annual revenue, raising capacity concerns.
Micro-company with large contracts: Only 3-4 employees per registry, yet awarded four contracts totaling 912K EUR in under 5 months.
Recent financial deterioration: Company swung from 31,105 EUR profit to -139,597 EUR loss, yet continues winning large public contracts.
Concentrated buyer: 3 of 4 contracts (74% of value) are with a single buyer — Obec Liptovské Sliače.
All contracts missing expiry dates (info-level flag on all 4 contracts).
mitigating_factors: Tax reliability status: 'vysoko spoľahlivý' (highly reliable) — the highest rating from Slovak Financial Administration.
No outstanding debts to health insurance (VSZP), social insurance, or tax authorities.
Company has been operating since 2007 — 18+ years of business history.
Positive equity of 376,995 EUR (as of 2022) and 436,619 EUR (latest FinStat).

data_sources: crz.db (zmluvy, red_flags, flag_rules, ruz_entities, ruz_equity, tax_reliability, vszp_debtors, socpoist_debtors, fs_tax_debtors)
